lanes.lane: Stock delayed quote and OHLCV history
lanes.continuityNote: Dedicated stock chart routes now have a clearer history posture, but retained OHLCV still depends on source-entry or partial provider writes instead of a durable market-history table.
lanes.nextStep: Write stock quote snapshots and OHLCV bars into a durable history table so public stock routes stop depending on seed bars and preview-only series continuity.

lanes.refreshWindow: Intraday-ready once provider sync is active
lanes.continuityNote: Native index chart presentation is stronger now, but retained index breadth and chart continuity still need a durable snapshot history layer.
lanes.nextStep: Persist tracked index snapshots and breadth history into a reusable table that can feed both charts and report-style archive routes.

lanes.refreshWindow: End-of-day NAV refresh plus factsheet verification pass
lanes.continuityNote: Fund routes now carry a saved backend posture for retained NAV and factsheet chronology, but the lane still needs durable provider-backed history writes.
lanes.nextStep: Persist NAV snapshots and factsheet chronology into a reusable history table once AMFI or provider refresh is active.

backlogLanes.note: The platform still needs explicit retention rules for quote bars, index breadth, fund NAV, and archive snapshots so chart continuity stays predictable.
Worker-backed replay jobs are still missing, so history backfills and gap repair cannot run automatically yet.
The same history series should eventually feed homepage, markets, detail routes, and admin audit surfaces from one durable cache layer.
